result.stdout:
>>> Greg PowerPlatform CLI Extended (PACX) <<< - Dataverse command tool
Version 1.2026.3.195
Online documentation: https://github.com/neronotte/Greg.Xrm.Command/wiki
Feedback, Suggestions, Issues: https://github.com/neronotte/Greg.Xrm.Command/discussions

Usage: pacx [auth] [column] [forms] [history] [key] [optionset] [org] [plugin] [project] [publish] [rel] [ribbon] [script] [settings] [solution] [table] [tool] [unifiedrouting] [view] [webresources] [workflow] 

  auth                        Manage how you authenticate to Dataverse environments
  column                      Execute manipulations on Dataverse columns
  forms                       Commands to streamline form manipulation
  history                     Provides access to the command history
  key                         Execute manipulations on Dataverse keys
  optionset                   Manage global or local option sets (Picklists)
  org                         Manage organization settings
  plugin                      Lightweight, command-line based, PluginRegistrationTool
  project                     Commands to create and work with PACX projects.
  publish                     Commands to manage manual customization publishing
  rel                         Executes operations on Dataverse relationships between tables
  ribbon                      Commands to access and manipulate application and table ribbons (command bars).
  script                      Commands to generate PACX scripts and OptionSet CSV from Dataverse tables.
  settings                    Commands to manipulate dataverse settings (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-apps/maker/data-platform/create-edit-configure-settings)
  solution                    Manages how you work with Dataverse solutions
  table                       Execute manipulations on Dataverse tables
  tool                        Allows adding, listing, updating and removing PACX tools
  unifiedrouting              Execute manipulations on unified routing settings
  view                        Execute manipulations on Dataverse views
  webresources                Commands to work with webresources
  workflow                    Commands to work with worflows (Power Automate Flows or legacy ones)

>>> Greg PowerPlatform CLI Extended (PACX) <<< - Dataverse command tool
Version 1.2026.3.195
Online documentation: https://github.com/neronotte/Greg.Xrm.Command/wiki
Feedback, Suggestions, Issues: https://github.com/neronotte/Greg.Xrm.Command/discussions

Invalid command

Usage: pacx [auth] [column] [forms] [history] [key] [optionset] [org] [plugin] [project] [publish] [rel] [ribbon] [script] [settings] [solution] [table] [tool] [unifiedrouting] [view] [webresources] [workflow] 

  auth                        Manage how you authenticate to Dataverse environments
  column                      Execute manipulations on Dataverse columns
  forms                       Commands to streamline form manipulation
  history                     Provides access to the command history
  key                         Execute manipulations on Dataverse keys
  optionset                   Manage global or local option sets (Picklists)
  org                         Manage organization settings
  plugin                      Lightweight, command-line based, PluginRegistrationTool
  project                     Commands to create and work with PACX projects.
  publish                     Commands to manage manual customization publishing
  rel                         Executes operations on Dataverse relationships between tables
  ribbon                      Commands to access and manipulate application and table ribbons (command bars).
  script                      Commands to generate PACX scripts and OptionSet CSV from Dataverse tables.
  settings                    Commands to manipulate dataverse settings (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-apps/maker/data-platform/create-edit-configure-settings)
  solution                    Manages how you work with Dataverse solutions
  table                       Execute manipulations on Dataverse tables
  tool                        Allows adding, listing, updating and removing PACX tools
  unifiedrouting              Execute manipulations on unified routing settings
  view                        Execute manipulations on Dataverse views
  webresources                Commands to work with webresources
  workflow                    Commands to work with worflows (Power Automate Flows or legacy ones)
